titleStmt.title: SII 27.76: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 76. (A.R. No. 232 of 1931-32.) GUṆḌUGALLU, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Base of dhvaja-staṁbha in a betel-garden called Kambadagaḍḍa-maḍi
This is dated Śaka 1322, Vi[krama], Prathama-Chaitra ba. 8, Wednesday corresponding to 1400 A.D., March 17, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·54.

It states that seven goldsmiths of Guṁḍuṁgalu whose names are given and who were sons of Kandōja, had the lamp-pillar erected, to god Mallikārjunadēva of Śrīparvata for the merit of their parents during the period of Mallinātha, younger brother of Dēvarāya who was an agent of Bhikshāvṛitti-Siddayya and Dēvayya. Guṁḍuṁgalapura is stated to have belonged to the temple of the deity. Veṅkayya wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Uttara dakṣiṇa pūrvva paścima catusamudrā
dhipati rājārāja rājaparamēsvara śrīmaṁnmahā
maṁḍalēsvara śrīvīra harihara mahārāyara ku
māra śrīvīra yiṁmaḍi bukaṁṇa voḍeyarā hari
haramahārāyaru pruthuvirājyaṁ vūḍuva kā
ladalu sakavaruṣa 1322 neya vikrama saṁvatsara
da prathama caitra ba 8 budhavāradalu śrīmallikārjuna

dēvarige saluva guṁḍuṁgalapuradali svastisa
masta prasasti (ta) sahitarpava bhikṣāvritti siddayya
dēvayyaṁgaḷu Āgñādhārigaḷu dēvarāyana taṁmmamalli
nāthana kāladalu guṁḍugala Akkasāri kaṁ
ḍōjana maga nājōja Eḷayōja haricāmōja ka
riya cāmōja cina cāmōja bayirōja Āṁ mō
jayavaru Eḷumaṁdi taṁma taṁde tāyige puṁṇya

vāgabēkeṁdu śrīparvvata mallikārjunadēvarige māḍisi
da dīpa māleya kaṁbhakke maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
śrī śrī śrī veṁkayyana bara ha
Digital edition of SII 27.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
